headline: Ethisphere Names Linde to 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® List
summary: WOKING, England, April 22, 2026--Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) today announced it has been included in the World's Most Ethical Companies® list for the sixth consecutive year.
